backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: replacing BottomNav with a fixed left sidebar navigation, and displaying the selected god's image in that sidebar.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing each component's purpose and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, chart, and UI element variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AnantJap PWA, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page routing, selected god state, and rendering the LeftSidebar alongside page content offset by 72px for the sidebar width.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Empty file — the BottomNav component has been removed and replaced by the LeftSidebar.
frontend/src/components/FirstLaunchWarni: Displays a dismissible alert warning users that jap data is stored locally and will be lost if the app is deleted, auto-hiding after 8 seconds.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with navigation links to Terms, Privacy, Copyright, and Feedback pages, plus a caffeine.ai attribution with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/GodCard.tsx: Card component displaying a deity's image, name, mantra, and jap/mala counts loaded from localStorage, with an optional remove button for custom gods.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header showing the AnantJap brand name and a language selector dropdown supporting Sanskrit, English, Hindi, and Gujarati.
frontend/src/components/LeftSidebar.tsx: A fixed vertical navigation sidebar with icon/image buttons for Home, JapCount, BhajanMarg, Dashboard, and Settings pages, plus an optional god image slot at the bottom with tooltips.
frontend/src/contexts/DevoteeContext.tsx: React context that manages a list of devotees and the currently selected devotee, persisting state to localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context providing multi-language support (Sanskrit, English, Hindi, Gujarati) with a translation lookup function `t` and language persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider implementing Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Minimal placeholder hook that returns an empty object, indicating no backend queries are needed since all data is stored locally.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base styles, a spiritual-themed OKLCH color palette for light and dark modes, and custom gradient/color utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BhajanMargPage.tsx: Displays a list of default and custom bhajans (devotional songs) with lyrics, allowing users to add up to 5 custom bhajans and remove non-default ones, with data persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPage.tsx: Static page displaying copyright information for AnantJap, covering intellectual property, spiritual content, user-generated content, open source attribution, and usage restrictions.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing jap count statistics via bar charts across daily/weekly/monthly/yearly views, with a calendar and an AI-generated devotion report, pulling data from localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/FeedbackPage.tsx: Simple feedback form page with name, email, and message fields that simulates submission with a delay and shows a success toast notification.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page displaying default and custom deity cards for selection, with dialogs to add new devotees or custom gods, persisting custom gods in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/JapCountPage.tsx: Jap counting page for a selected deity that tracks tap or swipe increments, calculates mala counts (per 108 japs), and persists daily and cumulative counts in localStorage per devotee.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Renders a static Privacy Policy page explaining that AnantJap stores all data locally, collects no personal information, and outlines data security, deletion, and contact sections.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page allowing users to toggle theme (light/dark/system), choose jap input method (tap/swipe), and export, import, or delete all local app data.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Renders a static Terms & Conditions page covering use license, local data storage, disclaimers, limitations, and spiritual content policy for AnantJap.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking schema version, existing implemented features, known issues (swipe gesture, image card blank area), and pending feature requests including UI redesign and swipe-up fix.
